prompt:
GOAL: sourcea.app/ is already live. the old kernel page is already deployed on source-a.vercel.app/sourcea/ — wire it as a subpage under sourcea.app. dont redeploy everything from scratch! just fix it e2e.

CONTEXT (true now — do not re-derive):
  - ALREADY DONE / DEPLOYED (do NOT redo): sourcea.app/ is already live. the old kernel page is already deployed on source-a.vercel.app/sourcea/ — wire it as a subpage under sourcea.app.
  - Systems involved: Vercel
  - Accounts/access if relevant: (add account/access if the agent needs it)

WHAT I WANT: (the outcome you want — not the steps)

DONE = the outcome above is true and verified end-to-end on the real surface.

VERIFY: show me how you confirmed it actually works — curl output / test log / the live
URL loading the correct content with valid TLS. Receipts, not "it's done".

CONSTRAINTS:
- NO rebuild, NO redeploy, NO starting over if it already exists — wire/fix, don't recreate.
- One job only — do not bundle unrelated work into this mission.
- Don't break anything already working (or its TLS / live state).
- Verdicts from receipts only — no build theater, no 'it's green' without proof.

IF BLOCKED or ambiguous: STOP and tell me what's missing or which decision is mine (naming, paths, which project/provider). Do not guess my intent. Do not deploy a placeholder.

findings.message: You mention something already exists AND a build/deploy. The prompt will pin ALREADY DONE and forbid rebuilding it.
No verification asked — the machine will add a receipt-based VERIFY step.

already_done: the old kernel page is already deployed on source-a.vercel.app/sourcea/ — wire it as a subpage under sourcea.app.
